violations.text: The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Sanitizer bottle was observed empty at the time of inspection. Establishment is to use 3-bay sink to sanitize until dishwasher is able to reach the proper chlorine concentration. 3-bay sink was set up at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026

The door to the outside, located in the main entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2026
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quat sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Establishment is to obtain test strips. New Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2026
